attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.PROJ_AUTOMATION_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.TASK_AUTOMATION_ID, TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.TASK_NAME USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) TASK_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.START_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.COMPLETION_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.WORKPLAN_FLAG, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.FINANCIAL_PLAN_FLAG, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.TASK_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.CHARGEABLE_FLAG, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.BILLABLE_FLAG, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.TASK_WORK_TYPE, TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.DESCRIPTION USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) DESCRIPTION, TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.LONG_NAME USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) LONG_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.TASK_ORGANIZATION_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.TASK_ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.WBS_LEVEL, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.PARENT_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.TASK_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.INSTALL_SITE_CONTACT_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.INSTALL_SITE_PHONE_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.INSTALL_SITE_USE_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK,
(
select TASK_AUTOMATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK
minus
select TASK_AUTOMATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK
) ACM
where 
 ACM.TASK_AUTOMATION_ID = STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.TASK_AUTOMATION_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_TASK.REFRESH_DATETIME
